title: Optimized Binary Search Tree Balance
scenario: Create an optimized binary search tree balancing algorithm prompt for LLM. The tree should have at least 10 nodes and be unbalanced initially. The algorithm should rebalance the tree while maintaining the binary search tree property. The LLM should output a high-quality, readable prompt that takes an array of integers as input and outputs a balanced binary search tree as a JSON object.
constraints: Must include a clear explanation of the algorithm

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt adheres to the word limit and includes a clear explanation of the algorithm.
Check if the prompt is syntactically valid and correctly formatted.
Check if the algorithm accurately rebalances the binary search tree.
